message:
refactor(mvcc,vdbe): SSI commit validation cleanup and witness key migration

Begin Concurrent (SSI):
- Replace read_pages/write_pages Vec<PageNumber> with read_keys/write_keys
  Vec<WitnessKey> in PreparedConcurrentCommit, aligning the commit evidence
  with the witness-based SSI validation model instead of raw page numbers
- Move marked_for_abort check before SSI edge discovery (fail fast before
  computing expensive edge analysis)
- Simplify pivot detection: collapse the committed-reader/committed-writer
  pivot checks into the single has_in_rw && has_out_rw check, returning
  a structured SsiAbortReason::Pivot instead of separate error paths
- Remove redundant handle.has_in_rw/has_out_rw persistence (observability
  flags are already captured in the PreparedConcurrentCommit)
- Use handle.token()/handle.begin_seq() accessors instead of reaching
  into snapshot internals

SSI Validation:
- Update validation functions to work with sorted witness keys
- Simplify edge source classification

SSI Anomaly Tests:
- Update test assertions to match new WitnessKey-based evidence format

VDBE Codegen:
- Refine aggregate function register allocation for window frames
- Improve vectorized ops bounds checking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
